visual_description: In a dark, outdoor setting at night, a man in a dark jacket is seen from the side, holding a small, dark object up to his eye, as if looking through it. The scene cuts to a wider view of a dark road next to a body of water, where a black car with its red taillights on is parked, and a few indistinct figures are near it. The final shot shows a man in a dark jacket looking up with a surprised expression, while another man with a shaved head stands beside him in the darkness.
audio_description: A loud, sustained, low-pitched electronic tone plays throughout the clip. A male voice shouts a single, high-pitched word.
